arts.ttl: Real Madrid reach Trent agreement as €40m January transfer confirmed
arts.sum: Real Madrid have completed an agreement with Trent Alexander-Arnold that will see the Liverpool right-back depart Anfield for the Bernabeu in the summer as a free agent while a significant January signing is planned. Alexander-Arnold could arrive this month provided that Liverpool lower their demands to €35m, maybe €40m

arts.ttl: 9 Bad And Good Observations On Real Madrid’s Tactical Chaos
arts.sum: I understand Toni Kroos no longer plays football and that the team’s defense has fallen off a cliff with the withering depth chart — but there’s no way a team with this much talent in the front-six should struggle this much against every good team they come up against. When teams implement a man-to-man high press against Real Madrid, the build-up is clunky, disjointed — with little-to-no flow or clear-cut plan to escape pressure.

arts.ttl: Twice humbled by Barca, second in LaLiga - how much trouble is Ancelotti's in at Real Madrid ?

arts.ttl: Inter Miami signs Tadeo Allende on loan from Celta Vigo
arts.sum: Inter Miami CF signed Tadeo Allende from Celta Vigo Tuesday on a one-year loan through the end of the 2025 Major League Soccer season. Mascherano said he was actively looking for players with a competitive mindset that can take on the responsibilities associated with Inter Miami.
